title: Right to Return of Security Deposit
summary: Tenants have the right to receive their security deposit after vacating the property if no damage is caused.

plainExplanation.whatItMeans: Landlords cannot unfairly keep your deposit once the tenancy ends.
plainExplanation.whyItMatters: Prevents landlords from exploiting tenants financially.

whatCountsAsDefect: Landlord refuses to return deposit without valid reason

exampleScenario.situation: Tenant vacates house but landlord refuses to return deposit.
exampleScenario.explanation: Tenant can demand refund or take legal action.
